description_long: This is a cylindrical container for Estee Lauder Re-Nutriv Lightweight Re-Nutriv Creme, featuring a smooth, matte beige exterior. The container has a wide, flat base and a slightly larger, rounded screw-on cap that fits snugly on top. The front of the container displays the Estee Lauder logo and product information in black text, while the rest of the surface is plain. The cap and body are both made of plastic, giving the object a sturdy yet lightweight feel. The overall design is minimalist, with only the brand's logo and product details as decorative elements. The container is likely filled with a cream or lotion, making it suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A beige, cylindrical Estee Lauder Re-Nutriv lotion container with a smooth, matte finish and minimalist branding. It features a wide screw-on cap and simple black text on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Estee Lauder logo, product name, and detailed text on a smooth beige surface.
description_view_1: Side view with the cap and body visible, but only partial text and logo are seen, mostly plain beige surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain beige surface with no visible text or graphics, highlighting the container's cylindrical shape.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the edge of the logo and a mostly plain beige surface, with the cap and body junction visible.
